context: Tests whether the agent designs the AP database schema using the correct conventions: monetary amounts in cents as BIGINT, UUID primary keys with gen_random_uuid(), correct status enumerations via CHECK constraints, proper unique constraints and partial indexes, credit memo type support, and the correct set of tables with their relationships.

checklist.name: Cents storage
checklist.description: All monetary amount columns use BIGINT (not DECIMAL/NUMERIC/FLOAT) and are named with a _cents suffix (e.g., total_cents, subtotal_cents, paid_cents, amount_cents)

checklist.name: UUID primary keys
checklist.description: Primary key columns use UUID type with gen_random_uuid() as the default value

checklist.name: Invoice status enum
checklist.description: The invoice status column uses a CHECK constraint containing all of: 'received', 'processing', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'scheduled', 'paid', 'disputed', 'void'

checklist.name: Match status enum
checklist.description: A match_status column exists with a CHECK constraint containing all of: 'unmatched', 'partial', 'matched', 'exception'

checklist.name: Payment method enum
checklist.description: A payment_method column uses a CHECK constraint containing at least: 'ach', 'wire', 'check', 'card'

checklist.name: Payment status enum
checklist.description: A payments table status column uses a CHECK constraint containing at least: 'pending', 'submitted', 'cleared', 'returned', 'cancelled'

checklist.name: Payment run status enum
checklist.description: A payment_runs table status column uses a CHECK constraint containing at least: 'draft', 'approved', 'submitted', 'completed'

checklist.name: Duplicate invoice constraint
checklist.description: A UNIQUE constraint exists on (vendor_id, invoice_number) to prevent duplicate invoice entries

checklist.name: Due-date partial index
checklist.description: A partial index exists on (due_date, status) with a WHERE clause filtering to status values 'approved' and/or 'scheduled'

checklist.name: Vendor balance partial index
checklist.description: A partial index exists on (vendor_id, status) with a WHERE clause excluding 'paid' and 'void' statuses

checklist.name: Credit memo support
checklist.description: A 'type' column exists on the invoices table with values including 'invoice' and 'credit_memo' (credit memos use negative amounts to offset open balances)

checklist.name: Discount cents column
checklist.description: The payments table includes a discount_cents column (BIGINT) separate from the payment amount
